segment.source: Renders a heading and optional subheadline above a plain text list of features, each with a title and one-line description — no icons, images, or cards, just typography and whitespace. Use it for: short benefit or capability lists that come without icons or imagery, quiet spec summaries, principles or values stated as brief text pairs. Prefer 'Feature Overview Grid' or 'Icon Feature Grid' when items carry icons; use 'Feature Checklist' for included-items check lists.
